title: xanthophyllum ellipticum
intro: Xanthophyllum ellipticum is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections, and has been found to have potential health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress and improving immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Xanthophyllum ellipticum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
